name: Aura FAT Projects Acquisition Corp Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: Aura FAT Projects Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus its search on businesses with disruptive technology and sustainable solutions. Aura FAT Projects Acquisition Corp is based in Singapore.
